title: SASC Advances Nomination of Driscoll for...
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by roll call to report out favorably the nomination of Mr. Daniel P. Driscoll to be the next...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by roll call to report out favorably the nomination of Mr. Daniel P. Driscoll to be the next Secretary of the Army.
The nomination was immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
